name: JoAi: Create Element

description.en: Create a new reusable element — a building block like a text snippet, image prompt, or template that your agent can use in content production.
description.de: Erstelle ein neues wiederverwendbares Element — einen Baustein wie einen Textschnipsel, Bild-Prompt oder eine Vorlage, die dein Agent bei der Content-Produktion nutzen kann.
description.es: Create a new reusable element — a building block like a text snippet, image prompt, or template that your agent can use in content production.
description.fr: Create a new reusable element — a building block like a text snippet, image prompt, or template that your agent can use in content production.
description.ro: Create a new reusable element — a building block like a text snippet, image prompt, or template that your agent can use in content production.
description.it: Create a new reusable element — a building block like a text snippet, image prompt, or template that your agent can use in content production.

bot: Use this when the user wants to add a new reusable element or building block for their agent. Ask for a name, type, and content/prompt.

inputs.name: Name
inputs.bot: A short descriptive name for this element (e.g., 'Hero tagline', 'Product image prompt').

inputs.name: Type
inputs.bot: The element type — e.g., text, image, template, prompt.

inputs.name: Content

description.en: The content or body of this element
description.de: Der Inhalt oder Text dieses Elements
description.es: The content or body of this element
description.fr: The content or body of this element
description.ro: The content or body of this element
description.it: The content or body of this element

inputs.bot: The actual content, text, or prompt for this element.

inputs.name: Prompt

description.en: An AI prompt for generating this element's content
description.de: Ein KI-Prompt zur Generierung des Inhalts dieses Elements
description.es: An AI prompt for generating this element's content
description.fr: An AI prompt for generating this element's content
description.ro: An AI prompt for generating this element's content
description.it: An AI prompt for generating this element's content

inputs.bot: An optional generation prompt if this element should be AI-generated.
